name: Mary Clark's Perlow Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the chicken with seasonings at 350°F until done, about 1½ hours.
2. Remove from oven; save pan drippings and cool chicken.
3. Meanwhile, on the stove, boil gizzard and other parts in enough water to cover.
4. Remove, saving liquid.
5. When cool enough to handle, remove meat from baked chicken; chop up about 1/3 of meat as well as gizzards. Reserve remainder of chicken to serve with dinner.
6. Wash rice well.
7. In a large pot, cook rice with 3½ cups liquid using pan drippings, cooking liquid from gizzards, and enough chicken broth to make 3½ cups.
8. When rice is nearly done, stir in chopped chicken and gizzards and continue cooking until rice is completely done. If desired, onion and celery can be stirred in at this point.
